meaning: n.骑士(或爵士)的地位、身份
examples: He received a knighthood in the New Year's Honours list.
He has been honoured with a knighthood for his scientific work.
When he finally received his knighthood in 1975 Chaplin was 85.
This entire story amounts to campaign lobbying for Steve Jobs to be awarded a Knighthood.
The only record of a knighthood being given up was Bengali poet Rabindranath Tagore in 1919.
